Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Return of the Obra Dinn: spherical mapped dithering for a 1bpp first-person game 225 upvotes, 33 comments
  2. Noq: n0's new QUIC implementation in Rust 137 upvotes, 18 comments
  3. The Shape of Inequalities 90 upvotes, 14 comments
  4. NanoGPT Slowrun: 10x Data Efficiency with Infinite Compute 92 upvotes, 15 comments
  5. From Oscilloscope to Wireshark: A UDP Story (2022) 72 upvotes, 14 comments
  6. OpenBSD: PF queues break the 4 Gbps barrier 177 upvotes, 55 comments
  7. Show HN: Three new Kitten TTS models – smallest less than 25MB 301 upvotes, 102 comments
  8. The Day I Discovered Type Design 10 upvotes, 1 comments
  9. macOS 26 breaks custom DNS settings including .internal 312 upvotes, 158 comments
  10. Be intentional about how AI changes your codebase 58 upvotes, 23 comments
  11. EsoLang-Bench: Evaluating Genuine Reasoning in LLMs via Esoteric Languages 54 upvotes, 21 comments
  12. My Random Forest Was Mostly Learning Time-to-Expiry Noise 9 upvotes, 1 comments
  13. Astral to Join OpenAI 1188 upvotes, 736 comments
  14. Scaling Karpathy's Autoresearch: What Happens When the Agent Gets a GPU Cluster 115 upvotes, 58 comments
  15. Xiaomi launches next-gen SU7 with 902 km range and Lidar, still undercuts Tesla 68 upvotes, 31 comments
  16. “Your frustration is the product” 409 upvotes, 243 comments
  17. Tesla: Failure of the FSD's degradation detection system [pdf] 157 upvotes, 84 comments
  18. Cockpit is a web-based graphical interface for servers 155 upvotes, 92 comments
  19. Juggalo makeup blocks facial recognition technology (2019) 223 upvotes, 140 comments
  20. How the Turner twins are mythbusting modern technical apparel 93 upvotes, 53 comments
  21. Launch HN: Voltair (YC W26) – Drone and charging network for power utilities 46 upvotes, 23 comments
  22. Android developer verification: Balancing openness and choice with safety 26 upvotes, 11 comments
  23. An update on Steam / GOG changes for OpenTTD 258 upvotes, 181 comments
  24. Clockwise acquired by Salesforce and shutting down next week 63 upvotes, 40 comments
  25. Connecticut and the 1 Kilometer Effect 39 upvotes, 25 comments
  26. Waymo Safety Impact 193 upvotes, 182 comments
  27. Bombarding gamblers with offers greatly increases betting and gambling harm 40 upvotes, 34 comments
  28. Google details new 24-hour process to sideload unverified Android apps 443 upvotes, 526 comments
  29. 4Chan mocks £520k fine for UK online safety breaches 239 upvotes, 388 comments
  30. How many branches can your CPU predict? 6 upvotes, 26 comments

Last generated 8:30am, 20 March 2026. Source here.
